features.title: Three steps to results
features.sub: Upload your jewelry — get a finished photo. AI handles the rest.
features.step1Desc: Any phone photo, any background — AI processes it automatically.
features.step2Desc: Pick a template from the library. Rings, earrings, pendants — all supported.
features.step3Desc: Download and publish immediately — on Instagram, Kaspi, and your website.

pricing.title: Transparent pricing
pricing.freeTrialSub: on signup — no credit card needed.
pricing.startDesc: For getting started with AI content
pricing.proDesc: For brands with high content volume

faq.title: Frequently asked questions
faq.a1: You upload a photo of your jewelry, choose a pose template from the library, and AI generates a professional lifestyle photo in 5–15 seconds. No photographer, studio, or expensive equipment needed.
faq.a2: Any jewelry: rings, earrings, bracelets, chains, pendants, brooches. A regular phone photo is enough — the service processes the image automatically.
faq.q3: Do I need a professional camera?
faq.a3: No. The service works with regular smartphone photos. AI automatically isolates the jewelry and places it in a professional lifestyle context.
faq.a4: 5 generations free on signup — no credit card needed. Paid plans: Starter — $1/mo (20 generations), Brand Business — $20/mo (150 generations). Cancel anytime.
faq.q5: Where can I use the generated photos?
faq.a5: Photos are suitable for Instagram, Kaspi.kz, websites, online catalogs, marketplaces, and price lists. Downloaded in high resolution.
